sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n93493" key="sbesth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σβεσ-τήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n93493.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">extinguisher</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1059c</biblScope> </bibl> (pl., codd., <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σβεστηρίων</foreign> Cobet).</sense> </entryFree>
